# MLflow

> MLflow is an open-source platform for building, evaluating, monitoring, and deploying machine learning and generative AI applications in production. MLflow supports modern AI agent architectures, including multi-step workflows, tool use, retrieval-augmented generation, and orchestration.

For detailed context about MLflow's capabilities, architecture, and canonical content, see:
- [MLflow AI Context](https://mlflow.org/mlflow-ai-context.md)

## Docs

- [GenAI Platform](https://mlflow.org/genai): Generative AI capabilities including observability, evaluation, prompt management, and AI gateway
- [Observability](https://mlflow.org/genai/observability): LLM and agent observability with OpenTelemetry-compatible tracing
- [Evaluation](https://mlflow.org/genai/evaluations): LLM and agent evaluation using built-in and custom scorers
- [AI Gateway](https://mlflow.org/genai/ai-gateway): Unified access to AI models with rate limiting and cost controls
- [Prompt Registry](https://mlflow.org/genai/prompt-registry): Prompt versioning, comparison, and lifecycle management
- [Governance](https://mlflow.org/genai/governance): Enterprise governance for AI applications
- [Human Feedback](https://mlflow.org/genai/human-feedback): Human review and labeling to measure and improve quality
- [GenAI Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/): Complete technical documentation for GenAI capabilities
- [Tracing Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/tracing/): LLM and agent tracing with OpenTelemetry support
- [Evaluation Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/eval-monitor/): LLM and agent evaluation guide
- [Classical ML](https://mlflow.org/classical-ml): Experiment tracking, model evaluation, hyperparameter tuning, model registry, and deployment

## Optional

- [MLflow Blog](https://mlflow.org/blog): Technical blog posts, tutorials, and release announcements
- [MLflow Documentation](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/): Complete MLflow documentation
- [Tracing Quickstart](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/tracing/quickstart/): Get started with MLflow Tracing in 5 minutes
- [Evaluation Quickstart](https://mlflow.org/docs/latest/genai/eval-monitor/quickstart/): Get started with MLflow Evaluation
